hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|json|css|html)$' || exit 0; d=$(dirname "$f"); while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do [ -f "$d/prettier.config.js" ] || [ -f "$d/.prettierrc" ] || [ -f "$d/.prettierrc.json" ] && break; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; cd "$d" && npx prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
